docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76754752) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EDGE RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.
